_comment: Hand-labeled champion-vs-clutter crops from the 2026-06-03 CLEAN re-test (no red dot). Indices are into each champion's clean-session PNG list, sorted ascending by integer filename (epoch-ms), filtered to filename >= min_ts. Labeled by visual inspection of the contact sheets. Dead-timer / black / ambiguous crops are intentionally omitted from both sets. See docs/plans/2026-06-03-cv-ssim-primary-detection.md Phase 1.

Mordekaiser._relabel_note: Re-labeled 2026-06-03 via teal/red ring+center breakdown. Earlier 'champion' guesses 1,2,15,29,30,31 were wrong: 2/15/29/30/31 carry red in the ring/center = ENEMY lock-ons; 1 is a turret. Only 0 (ring26/cen18) and 12 (ring15/cen8) are genuine ally-Morde crops — the tracker almost never found him (data-starved). Clutter folds in turrets (teal-filled), minion waves, terrain, and enemy-ring crops (all correctly score low on teal-annulus).
